goal: Build a knowledge graph of healthcare providers, their provider type, taxonomy group, and state, then answer questions about it.
notes: Small self-contained Tier-3 fixture in the holdout-v2 gold shape. Gold values are consistent with the bundled source CSV so a find->...->ask run is reproducible offline. Graph/predicate URIs are neutral example.org placeholders; the pure outcome grader never executes gold_sparql.

questions.question: How many distinct provider types are there?
questions.reasoning: Distinct provider_type values in the source are {Individual, Organization} = 2. Single entity, aggregation, no joins -> T1.

questions.question: List all taxonomy groups represented.
questions.reasoning: Distinct taxonomy_group values. Single entity, no joins, no filters -> T1.

questions.question: How many providers are located in California (CA)?
questions.reasoning: Providers with state=CA are Ashen Clinic, Cinder Health, Tinderbox Care = 3. Filter on one attribute -> T2.

questions.question: Which providers practice under the Cardiology taxonomy group?
questions.reasoning: Traversal from taxonomy group to the providers under it -> T3.
